sentences.target: Diese Speise schmeckt heute besonders gut.

translations.de: Diese Speise schmeckt heute besonders gut.
translations.en: This dish tastes especially good today.
translations.es: Hoy este plato está especialmente rico.
translations.fr: Ce plat est particulièrement bon aujourd’hui.
translations.it: Oggi questo piatto è particolarmente buono.
translations.pt: Este prato está especialmente gostoso hoje.
translations.vi: Hôm nay món này đặc biệt ngon.
translations.ar: هذا الطبق لذيذ اليوم بشكل خاص.
translations.nl: Dit gerecht smaakt vandaag extra lekker.
translations.hu: Ez az étel ma különösen finom.
translations.hi: आज यह डिश खास तौर पर बहुत स्वादिष्ट है.
translations.pl: To danie jest dziś wyjątkowo smaczne.
translations.el: Αυτό το πιάτο είναι σήμερα ιδιαίτερα νόστιμο.
translations.nb: Denne retten smaker spesielt godt i dag.
translations.id: Hari ini hidangan ini terasa sangat enak.
translations.sv: Den här rätten smakar extra gott i dag.
translations.ro: Astăzi acest fel de mâncare este deosebit de bun.
translations.cs: Dnes to jídlo chutná obzvlášť dobře.
translations.da: Denne ret smager ekstra godt i dag.
translations.fi: Tämä ruoka maistuu tänään erityisen hyvältä.
translations.ja: 今日はこの料理が特においしいです。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner modifying 'Speise'; marks the noun phrase in nominative singular.
Head noun of the subject noun phrase; feminine singular.
Finite main verb (3rd person singular, present) expressing perception of taste.
Temporal adverb modifying 'schmeckt'; indicates the time of tasting.
Degree adverb intensifying 'gut'; indicates a higher-than-normal degree.
Adverbial predicate complement with 'schmeckt' describing the quality of taste.

sentences.target: Ich bestelle die Speise ohne Zwiebeln.

translations.de: Ich bestelle die Speise ohne Zwiebeln.
translations.en: I’m ordering the dish without onions.
translations.fr: Je commande le plat sans oignons.
translations.zh-Hans: 我要点这道菜，不要洋葱。
translations.yue: 我要呢道菜，唔好落洋蔥。
translations.vi: Tôi gọi món này không hành tây.
translations.nl: Ik bestel het gerecht zonder ui.
translations.hi: मुझे यह डिश बिना प्याज़ चाहिए.
translations.id: Saya pesan hidangan ini tanpa bawang bombai.
translations.cs: Objednávám si to jídlo bez cibule.
translations.ja: この料理を玉ねぎ抜きで注文します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; subject of the clause (1st person singular).
Finite main verb (1st person singular, present) expressing the action.
Definite article introducing the direct object noun phrase.
Direct object of 'bestelle' (accusative); head of the NP.
Preposition introducing a PP that specifies exclusion.
Object of the preposition 'ohne'; plural; specifies what is excluded.

sentences.target: Die Speise ist leider zu scharf.

translations.de: Die Speise ist leider zu scharf.
translations.en: The dish is unfortunately too spicy.
translations.es: Por desgracia, el plato está demasiado picante.
translations.fr: Le plat est malheureusement trop épicé.
translations.it: Purtroppo il piatto è troppo piccante.
translations.pt: Infelizmente o prato está apimentado demais.
translations.vi: Tiếc là món này cay quá.
translations.nl: Helaas is het gerecht te pittig.
translations.hi: अफसोस, यह डिश बहुत तीखी है.
translations.pl: Niestety to danie jest zbyt ostre.
translations.el: Δυστυχώς, το πιάτο είναι πολύ καυτερό.
translations.ro: Din păcate, felul este prea iute.
translations.cs: Bohužel je to jídlo příliš pálivé.
translations.ja: 残念ながら、その料理は辛すぎます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article introducing the subject noun phrase.
Head noun of the subject; feminine singular.
Copular auxiliary linking the subject to the predicative adjective.
Sentence adverb expressing speaker attitude; modifies the whole clause.
Degree adverb marking excess; modifies 'scharf'.
Predicative adjective complement with the copula 'ist'; describes the subject's property.

sentences.target: Meine Oma kocht die Speise nach Rezept.
sentences.reading: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈoːma kɔxt diː ˈʃpaɪ̯zə naːx ʁeˈtsɛpt/

translations.de: Meine Oma kocht die Speise nach Rezept.
translations.ipa: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈoːma kɔxt diː ˈʃpaɪ̯zə naːx ʁeˈtsɛpt/
translations.en: My grandma cooks the dish according to the recipe.
translations.es: Mi abuela cocina el plato siguiendo la receta.
translations.fr: Ma grand-mère prépare le plat en suivant la recette.
translations.it: Mia nonna cucina il piatto seguendo la ricetta.
translations.ko: 우리 할머니는 레시피대로 그 요리를 만들어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我奶奶按照食谱做这道菜。
translations.yue: 我阿嫲照住食譜煮呢道菜。
translations.ru: Моя бабушка готовит блюдо по рецепту.
translations.pt: Minha avó prepara o prato de acordo com a receita.
translations.he: סבתא שלי מבשלת את המנה לפי המתכון.
translations.vi: Bà tôi nấu món này theo công thức.
translations.nl: Mijn oma kookt het gerecht volgens het recept.
translations.uk: Моя бабуся готує страву за рецептом.
translations.hu: A nagymamám a recept szerint főzi az ételt.
translations.hi: मेरी दादी नुस्खे के अनुसार यह डिश बनाती हैं.
translations.pl: Moja babcia gotuje danie według przepisu.
translations.el: Η γιαγιά μου μαγειρεύει το πιάτο ακολουθώντας τη συνταγή.
translations.nb: Bestemoren min lager retten etter oppskriften.
translations.id: Nenek saya memasak hidangan ini sesuai resep.
translations.sv: Min mormor lagar rätten enligt receptet.
translations.ro: Bunica mea gătește felul după rețetă.
translations.cs: Moje babička vaří to jídlo podle receptu.
translations.da: Min bedstemor laver retten efter opskriften.
translations.ja: 祖母はレシピ通りにその料理を作ります。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying 'Oma'; marks ownership in the subject NP.
Head noun of the subject; common noun (familial term).
Finite main verb (3rd person singular, present) describing the action.
Definite article introducing the direct object noun phrase.
Direct object of 'kocht'; head of the NP.
Preposition introducing a PP specifying the standard or source.
Object of the preposition 'nach'; denotes the guideline followed.

Meine Oma kocht die Speise nach Rezept.

I’m ordering the dish without onions.
The dish is unfortunately too spicy.
My grandma cooks the dish according to the recipe.
